SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY.title: Dream Key
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY.flavor: The key waits for the right dream.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_BOOK_PAGE.title: Dream Book Page
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_BOOK_PAGE.description: The first time each turn you play a [gold]Released[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_BOOK_PAGE.flavor: Each page waits for a moment that only becomes clear once named.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_RIBBON.title: Dream Ribbon
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_RIBBON.description: The first time each combat you play a [red]Temporary[/red] card, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_RIBBON.flavor: A small bow tied around a vanishing dream.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_CHARM.title: Kero Charm
SAKURAMOD-KERO_CHARM.description: At the start of combat, add a [red]Temporary[/red] Kero Advice to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_CHARM.flavor: Tiny wings, loud confidence, occasional useful advice.
SAKURAMOD-YUE_MAGIC_CRYSTAL.title: Yue's Magic Crystal
SAKURAMOD-YUE_MAGIC_CRYSTAL.description: Every third Clear Card you play each combat grants 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-YUE_MAGIC_CRYSTAL.flavor: A pale crystal condensed from Yue's quiet moonlit magic.
SAKURAMOD-BAGUA_COMPASS.title: Bagua Compass
SAKURAMOD-BAGUA_COMPASS.description: Each turn, the first Clear Card you play randomly gains one Element: [gold]Wind[/gold], [gold]Water[/gold], [gold]Fire[/gold], or [gold]Earth[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-BAGUA_COMPASS.flavor: The compass turns, setting a direction for transparent magic.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_SEWING_KIT.title: Tomoyo Sewing Kit
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_SEWING_KIT.description: The first time each turn you play a Partner card, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] and make a [red]Temporary[/red] card in hand cost 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_SEWING_KIT.flavor: Every stitch in a battle costume carries a little protection.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_JOURNAL.title: Dream Journal
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_JOURNAL.description: The first time each turn you play a [gold]Released[/gold] card, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_JOURNAL.flavor: Tomorrow's dream writes back in a hand you almost recognize.
SAKURAMOD-CLEAR_CARD_CASE.title: Clear Card Case
SAKURAMOD-CLEAR_CARD_CASE.description: Whenever you play a [red]Temporary[/red] Clear Card, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-CLEAR_CARD_CASE.flavor: A transparent case keeps every vanishing card close at hand.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_TRUE_FORM.title: Dream Key True Form
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_TRUE_FORM.descriptio: Replaces [gold]Dream Key[/gold]. At the start of combat, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 2.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_TRUE_FORM.flavor: The key finally reveals its true form.
SAKURAMOD-KAITO_POCKET_WATCH.title: Kaito's Pocket Watch
SAKURAMOD-KAITO_POCKET_WATCH.flavor: The hands turn back, and the cost is set.
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_ALICE_BOOK.title: Alice in Clockland
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_ALICE_BOOK.description: At the start of combat, your Clear Cards gain [gold]Release[/gold]. Shuffle 3 [red]Dazed[/red] into your draw pile.
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_ALICE_BOOK.flavor: When the story turns a page, dream and waking are drawn into the clockwork land.
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_BOOK_TRUTH.title: Nameless Book
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_BOOK_TRUTH.descriptio: [gold]Manifest[/gold] chooses from all 36 Clear Cards instead of your deck.
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_BOOK_TRUTH.flavor: The blank pages open past what Sakura has already named.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.title: Kero's Snack Box
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.description: Gain {Relics:diff()} relics. Add 1 Gale and 1 Siege to your deck.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.eventDescriptio: Gain {Relics:diff()} relics. Add 1 Gale and 1 Siege.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.flavor: Kero packed snacks, surprises, and a little extra trouble.
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.title: Broken Clock Gear
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.description: Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP. Transform 1 Gale and 1 Siege.
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.eventDescrip: Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP. Transform 1 Gale and 1 Siege.
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.flavor: A cracked gear still turns change through the hands of time.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_GALE_PLUSHIE.title: Tomoyo's Gale Plushie
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_GALE_PLUSHIE.flavor: A handmade Gale plushie, stitched with Tomoyo's usual care.
